name: parallax
description: A desktop, BYOK multi-model image generation workbench — compare results from multiple AI models side-by-side.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron-builder --linux
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run electron:tsc && electron-builder --publish always
